x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Security Operations is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for SIR including incident summarization, similar incident matching, and playbook recommendations. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for Security Operations Plugin Status
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for Security Operations via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.
